meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve slow development speed (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome slow development speed. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve Slow Dev Speed
content.seo_description: Overcome slow development cycles with the Antigravity project template. An advanced, step-by-step checklist for freelancers using Claude Code for speed.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting hours on boilerplate and environment configuration. By leveraging the Antigravity project template combined with Claude Code, you can automate scaffold generation, enforce architectural standards, and ship production-ready features in minutes rather than days. This workflow slashes development overhead, allowing you to focus purely on high-value client logic.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you’re still wrestling with dependency hell and repetitive boilerplate. Every hour spent configuring a new repo is an hour lost on the features that actually pay the bills. The industry is moving toward autonomous engineering, and if you’re still coding line-by-line, you’re losing your competitive edge.

Enter the Antigravity project template: the ultimate accelerator for high-velocity freelancers. By combining this structured framework with the reasoning power of Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into a systems architect. It’s time to stop building from scratch and start building at scale.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational project structure using the Antigravity template to ensure type-safety and modularity from commit zero.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity template with support for Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase integration.

steps.title: Configure Domain-Driven Architecture
steps.description: Define your core business entities and database schema within the template to maintain a clean separation of concerns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a domain model for a SaaS subscription billing system including user roles and organization ownership.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --file schema.prisma --edit 'Add User, Organization, and Subscription models'

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Use the template's built-in hooks to generate type-safe CRUD endpoints, saving you from manual boilerplate coding.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate RESTful API routes for the organization entity with validation and error handling using the Antigravity pattern.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Generate CRUD API routes for Organizations using standard Antigravity patterns'

steps.title: Implement UI Components with Consistency
steps.description: Inject pre-styled, accessibility-compliant components to ensure your client's dashboard looks premium without custom CSS overhead.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive data table component using the Antigravity UI library with sorting and filtering capabilities.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Create DataTable component with Shadcn/Antigravity integration'

steps.title: Final Production Audit
steps.description: Perform an automated code review to ensure the codebase adheres to performance and security standards before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current repository for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks based on Antigravity best practices.

pro_tips: Always use the --dry-run flag in Claude Code to review architectural changes before committing to the filesystem.
Maintain a local 'Custom Components' library within your Antigravity template to reuse across different client projects.
Use Claude Code's context-window management by strictly defining your 'feature-scope' in every prompt to avoid hallucinated dependencies.
Implement automated testing hooks within the template’s CI pipeline to ensure that AI-generated code never breaks existing production logic.
Rename your common utility functions to match the project domain early; this helps the AI maintain semantic consistency throughout the codebase.
content.next_steps: Once the foundation is set, deploy your first version to Vercel and invite your client to the staging environment. Use the feedback loop to iterate quickly using Claude Code's patch functionality.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your time for slow, manual development. Join the ranks of elite freelancers who ship faster, earn more, and build better. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
